CREATE TABLE article (id INT, pub_date DATE, description TEXT, author_name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX idx_article_pub ON article (pub_date, id);
CREATE TABLE author (author_id INT, name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE article_author (article_id INT, author_id INT);
CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX idx_article_author ON article_author (article_id, author_id);
CREATE TEXT INDEX ON article (description) WITH KEY dtid CLUSTERED WITH (pub_date, author_name);
INSERT INTO article (id, pub_date, description, author_name) VALUES (1, '2023-01-01', 'An article on database testing', 'Alice');
INSERT INTO article (id, pub_date, description, author_name) VALUES (2, '2022-12-01', 'An article on SQL optimization', 'Bob');
INSERT INTO author (author_id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice');
INSERT INTO author (author_id, name) VALUES (2, 'Bob');
INSERT INTO article_author (article_id, author_id) VALUES (1, 1);
INSERT INTO article_author (article_id, author_id) VALUES (2, 2);
SELECT a.id, a.description, a.pub_date FROM article a WHERE a.pub_date >= '2022-01-01' ORDER BY a.pub_date DESC;
SELECT a.id, a.description FROM article a JOIN article_author aa ON a.id = aa.article_id JOIN author au ON aa.author_id = au.author_id WHERE au.name = 'Alice' ORDER BY a.pub_date;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE description LIKE '%database%';
CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX idx_pubdate ON article (pub_date);
CREATE TABLE additional_info (info_id INT, article_id INT, extra_note TEXT);
CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX idx_additional ON additional_info (article_id);
INSERT INTO additional_info (info_id, article_id, extra_note) VALUES (1, 1, 'First test article');
SELECT a.id, ai.extra_note FROM article a LEFT JOIN additional_info ai ON a.id = ai.article_id WHERE a.id = 1;
UPDATE article SET description = 'Updated article on database testing' WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM article WHERE id = 2;
